answer:
The Coda API uses Bearer token authentication [1]. To authenticate, you must generate an API token from your Coda account settings [1][2]. This token must be included in the Authorization header of every API request using the format Bearer {token} [1]. All API requests must be made over HTTPS [1].

For Coda Packs development, the SDK provides the CodaApiHeaderBearerToken authentication type, which automates the inclusion of this header [3][4][5].

Example header format:
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN
